en: The vision of Isaiah the son of Amoz, which he saw concerning Judah and Jerusalem in the days of Uzziah, Jotham, Ahaz, and Hezekiah, kings of Judah.
zh: 在烏西雅、約坦、亞哈斯和希西家作猶大王的時候，亞摩斯的兒子以賽亞看見異象，是關於猶大和耶路撒冷的：

en: Hear, O heavens, and give ear, O earth; for the LORD has spoken: "Children have I reared and brought up, but they have rebelled against me.
zh: 諸天哪！要聽。大地啊！要留心聽。 因為耶和華說： “我把孩子養育，使他們成長， 他們卻背叛了我。

en: The ox knows its owner, and the donkey its master's crib, but Israel does not know, my people do not understand."
zh: 牛認識主人， 驢認識主人的槽； 以色列卻不認識我， 我的子民不明白我。”

en: Ah, sinful nation, a people laden with iniquity, offspring of evildoers, children who deal corruptly! They have forsaken the LORD, they have despised the Holy One of Israel, they are utterly estranged.
zh: 嗐！犯罪的國， 罪孽深重的子民， 行惡的子孫， 敗壞的兒女！ 他們離棄了耶和華， 藐視以色列的聖者， 他們轉離了他。

en: Why will you still be struck down? Why will you continue to rebel? The whole head is sick, and the whole heart faint.
zh: 你們為甚麼屢次悖逆， 還要受責打嗎？ 你們整個頭都受了傷， 整個心都發昏了。

en: From the sole of the foot even to the head, there is no soundness in it, but bruises and sores and raw wounds; they are not pressed out or bound up or softened with oil.
zh: 從腳掌到頭頂，沒有一處是完全的； 盡是創傷、鞭痕和流血的傷口； 沒有擠乾淨傷口，沒有包紮， 也沒有用膏油滋潤。

en: Your country lies desolate; your cities are burned with fire; in your very presence foreigners devour your land; it is desolate, as overthrown by foreigners.
zh: 你們的土地荒涼， 你們的城鎮被火燒毀， 你們的田地，在你們面前給外族人侵吞； 被外族人傾覆之後，就荒涼了。

en: And the daughter of Zion is left like a booth in a vineyard, like a lodge in a cucumber field, like a besieged city.
zh: 僅存的錫安居民 ， 好像葡萄園中的草棚， 瓜田裡的茅屋， 被圍困的城鎮。

en: If the LORD of hosts had not left us a few survivors, we should have been like Sodom, and become like Gomorrah.
zh: 若不是萬軍之耶和華 給我們留下一些生還者， 我們早已像所多瑪、 蛾摩拉一樣了。

en: Hear the word of the LORD, you rulers of Sodom! Give ear to the teaching of our God, you people of Gomorrah!
zh: 你們這些所多瑪的官長啊！要聽耶和華的話； 你們這些蛾摩拉的人民啊！要側耳聽我們 神的教訓。

en: "What to me is the multitude of your sacrifices? says the LORD; I have had enough of burnt offerings of rams and the fat of well-fed beasts; I do not delight in the blood of bulls, or of lambs, or of goats.
zh: 耶和華說：“你們獻上眾多祭物， 對我有甚麼益處呢？ 公綿羊的燔祭和肥畜的脂肪，我已經夠了； 公牛、羊羔和公山羊的血，我都不喜悅。

en: "When you come to appear before me, who has required of you this trampling of my courts?
zh: 你們來朝見我的時候， 誰要求你們這樣踐踏我的院子呢？

en: Bring no more vain offerings; incense is an abomination to me. New moon and Sabbath and the calling of convocations- I cannot endure iniquity and solemn assembly.
zh: 不要再帶沒有意義的供物來了， 燒獻祭物的香氣也是我厭惡的。 我厭煩月朔、安息日和集會； 作罪孽又守嚴肅會，是我不能容忍的。

en: Your new moons and your appointed feasts my soul hates; they have become a burden to me; I am weary of bearing them.
zh: 你們的月朔和制定的節期，我心裡恨惡； 它們都成了我的重擔， 我已承擔得不耐煩了。

en: When you spread out your hands, I will hide my eyes from you; even though you make many prayers, I will not listen; your hands are full of blood.
zh: 所以你們張開雙手的時候， 我必掩眼不看你們； 即使你們多多禱告， 我也不聽； 你們的手都沾滿血腥。

en: Wash yourselves; make yourselves clean; remove the evil of your deeds from before my eyes; cease to do evil,
zh: 你們要洗滌自己，潔淨自己； 從我眼前除掉你們的惡行； 要停止作惡，

en: learn to do good; seek justice, correct oppression; bring justice to the fatherless, plead the widow's cause.
zh: 學習行善， 尋求公平， 指責殘暴的人， 替孤兒伸冤， 為寡婦辨屈。”

en: "Come now, let us reason together, says the LORD: though your sins are like scarlet, they shall be as white as snow; though they are red like crimson, they shall become like wool.
zh: 耶和華說：“你們來，我們彼此辯論； 你們的罪雖像硃紅， 必變成雪白； 雖紅如丹顏， 必白如羊毛。

en: If you are willing and obedient, you shall eat the good of the land;
zh: 你們若願意聽從， 就必得吃地上的美物；

en: but if you refuse and rebel, you shall be eaten by the sword; for the mouth of the LORD has spoken."
zh: 你們若不聽從，反而悖逆， 就必被刀劍吞滅。” 這是耶和華親口說的。

en: How the faithful city has become a whore, she who was full of justice! Righteousness lodged in her, but now murderers.
zh: 那忠貞的城，怎麼會變成妓女！ 她從前充滿公平， 有公義居在其中， 現在卻有兇手居住。

en: Your silver has become dross, your best wine mixed with water.
zh: 你的銀子變成了渣滓， 你的酒用水攙混。

en: Your princes are rebels and companions of thieves. Everyone loves a bribe and runs after gifts. They do not bring justice to the fatherless, and the widow's cause does not come to them.
zh: 你的官長存心悖逆， 與盜賊同夥； 人都貪愛賄賂， 追索私酬； 他們不替孤兒伸冤， 寡婦的案件也呈不到他們面前。

en: Therefore the Lord declares, the LORD of hosts, the Mighty One of Israel: "Ah, I will get relief from my enemies and avenge myself on my foes.
zh: 因此，主萬軍之耶和華， 以色列的大能者說： “哎！我要向我的對頭雪恨， 向我的仇敵報復。

en: I will turn my hand against you and will smelt away your dross as with lye and remove all your alloy.
zh: 我必把手轉過來攻擊你； 我要煉除你的渣滓，如同用鹼來煉一樣， 我要除去你的一切雜質。

en: And I will restore your judges as at the first, and your counselors as at the beginning. Afterward you shall be called the city of righteousness, the faithful city."
zh: 我必恢復你的審判官，像起初一樣； 也必恢復你的謀士，像起先一般； 以後，你必稱為公義的城、 忠貞的城。”

en: Zion shall be redeemed by justice, and those in her who repent, by righteousness.
zh: 錫安必因公平蒙救贖， 城中悔改的人也必因公義蒙救贖。

en: But rebels and sinners shall be broken together, and those who forsake the LORD shall be consumed.
zh: 但悖逆的和犯罪的，必一同滅亡， 離棄耶和華的，也必滅亡。

en: For they shall be ashamed of the oaks that you desired; and you shall blush for the gardens that you have chosen.
zh: 你們必因你們所喜愛的橡樹抱愧， 必因你們所選擇的園子蒙羞。

en: For you shall be like an oak whose leaf withers, and like a garden without water.
zh: 因為你們必像一棵葉子凋落的橡樹， 又如一個缺水的園子。

en: And the strong shall become tinder, and his work a spark, and both of them shall burn together, with none to quench them.
zh: 有權勢的必如麻絮， 他所作的好像火星； 都要一同焚毀， 沒有人能撲滅。
